articles.title: STARTUPS
articles.summary: If you’re building a SaaS app, you have customer and product data. This data is key to building differentiated AI, and speaking to your customers' needs. If you’re an early stage startup, there’s a new way to collect, clean, and activate your data

articles.title: TEACHING WITH AI BY OPENAI
articles.summary: OpenAI has released a guide for educators on incorporating ChatGPT into classroom settings, highlighting its utility in simulating challenging conversations, aiding in curriculum design, assisting non-English speakers, and fostering critical thinking skills. The guide offers prompts and methodologies to maximize its educational benefits, ensuring teachers remain critical of the tool's outputs.

articles.title: MINUTE READ)
articles.summary: New AI startup Ideogram, backed by former Google Brain researchers, debuts with $16.5M in seed funding from a16z and Index Ventures. Ideogram sets itself apart with its reliable text generation within images, a common challenge for many AI image generators. The platform offers diverse style presets, with "typography" drawing notable attention.

articles.title: OPENAI’S MOONSHOT: SOLVING THE AI ALIGNMENT PROBLEM
articles.summary: An interview with Jan Leike, OpenAI’s head of alignment research.

articles.title: TINY LLAMA 1.1B PARAMETERS
articles.summary: The Tiny Llama project aims to train a 1.1B parameter Llama2 model for 3T tokens. According to scaling laws, this is a dramatic overtraining for compute optimality, but it brings significant gains for deployment optimality.

articles.title: SMARTER WAY TO LEARN MULTIPLE THINGS ONE AFTER ANOTHER [https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.16567v1?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: This paper proposes a system that helps models learn new tasks without forgetting the old ones.

articles.title: UNIFIED SPEECH TOKENIZER FOR SPEECH LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Researchers created SpeechTokenizer, a tool that helps models understand spoken language in a more effective way by using a special architecture that mixes different aspects of speech.

articles.title: LLM FINE-TUNING HUB
articles.summary: LLM Fine-tuning Hub contains code and insights to finetune various large language models for your use case.

articles.title: RAGAS
articles.summary: ragas is a framework that helps you evaluate your Retrieval Augmented Generation pipelines, a class of LLM applications that use external data to augment the LLM’s context.

articles.title: MINUTE READ)
articles.summary: This project suggests a new way to capture human motion in real time by combining regular camera images and special sensors called IMUs.

articles.title: LLM NOW PROVIDES TOOLS FOR WORKING WITH EMBEDDINGS
articles.summary: A breakdown of how to use the LLM CLI tool to make working with embeddings easier.

articles.title: HOW AI COULD HELP US TALK TO ANIMALS
articles.summary: AI is doing things people once thought impossible, even possibly enabling communication with animals.

articles.title: TRANSLATIONS
articles.summary: G/O Media has shuttered Gizmodo en Español, opting to use AI for article translations rather than its previous team. The switch hasn't been seamless, with some articles mixing Spanish and English. G/O Media had earlier faced criticism for unknowingly publishing AI-written articles with errors on Gizmodo.

articles.title: GPT RESEARCHER
articles.summary: GPT Researcher is an autonomous agent designed for comprehensive online research on a variety of tasks.
